_meta.author: minhxthanh
_meta.title: Animated Web3 Landing Page
_meta.description: A visually striking, animated hero section for a conceptual Web3 website. Built with React and Tailwind CSS, it features a futuristic, Tron-like aesthetic with a dynamic background, content that fades in, and foreground pillars that rise on load. All animations are self-contained within the component using CSS keyframes and React hooks.
